items.title: Base Bootstrap
items.description: Minimal PyStudio terminal bootstrap with proot and core shell packages.

items.title: Python/Pip Bootstrap
items.description: PyStudio terminal bootstrap with proot, Python, and pip preinstalled.

items.title: Python / Pip
items.description: CPython runtime, pip, and their Termux dependencies.

items.title: Node.js / npm
items.description: Node.js runtime and npm package manager.

items.title: C/C++ Toolchain
items.description: Compiler, sysroot, CMake, Ninja, Make, and pkg-config.

items.title: Tree-sitter Parsers
items.description: Tree-sitter CLI, runtime library, and common parser grammars for editor features.

items.title: Git
items.description: Git version control with SSH support for clone, fetch, and push workflows.

items.title: Crypto / Network Native Libraries
items.description: Native OpenSSL, libffi, libsodium, SSH, curl, HTTP/2, protobuf, gRPC, Kerberos, and c-ares dependencies.

items.title: Data Native Libraries
items.description: Native data storage and interchange libraries for DuckDB, Arrow, ORC, HDF5, NetCDF, SQLite, YAML, XML, and Zstd.

items.title: Image Native Libraries
items.description: Lightweight native JPEG, PNG, TIFF, WebP, OpenJPEG, FreeType, Fontconfig, and Leptonica dependencies for pip-built image packages.

items.title: XML / HTML Native Libraries
items.description: Native XML, HTML, YAML, tree-sitter, cleanup, and XML security dependencies.

items.title: Media Native Libraries
items.description: Lightweight native FLAC, Ogg/Vorbis/Opus, TagLib, WebP, PNG, and JPEG codec dependencies for pip-built media packages.

items.title: Scientific Native Libraries
items.description: Native numeric libraries commonly needed by NumPy, SciPy, sparse solvers, HDF5, NetCDF, and scientific wheels.

items.title: Visualization Native Libraries
items.description: Lightweight native plotting dependencies for pip-built visualization packages, avoiding Android SDK/Gradle dependency chains.

items.title: Pip Build Core
items.description: Pip, compilers, make, CMake, Ninja, pkg-config, pybind11, and common native headers.
